description: Capability set for the Packages secondary window. Self-fetches via the app-registered packages_* commands (list_packages, check_package_updates, install_package, update_package, uninstall_package, packages_window_ready) and listens for packages:* events. Without this file the window's invoke() calls silently fail the capability check and the window renders empty. shell:allow-open lets pack descriptions link out. Mirrors notification-history.json / desktop-alt.json.
